bindings.action: rotate all visible slices around display X by +/-5 degrees
rotate all visible slices around display Y by +/-5 degrees
rotate all visible slices around display Z by +/-5 degrees
switch tiled, overlay, and Flip layouts

reportPayload.strategy: self-contained Galaxy HTML with embedded PDB slices

rotationModel.dragSemantics: convert Molstar screen-axis drag deltas into coordinate-space rotation matrices, then apply the same delta independently to every visible slice
rotationModel.layoutOrder: rotate around local center, then place that center on a shared Flipbook slot anchor plus tile offset
rotationModel.pivot: geometric center of each full slice before mask splitting
rotationModel.verticalDragSign: screen dy is applied directly around the current screen-right axis

visualMapping.mode: normalize RMSX into the PDB B-factor column, then map 0..1 onto explicit Molstar putty worm radii
visualMapping.paletteOrder: Flipbook low-to-high palette is reversed before passing to Molstar because Molstar uncertainty coloring reverses its color list internally

source.name: TCBG Ubiquitin case study
source.attribution: Cruz-Chu, E. and Gumbart, J. C. Case study: Ubiquitin (2016).
source.redistribution: Derived educational test fixture distributed with source attribution under the TCBG educational-use statement.
